name: Inventory Turnover Risk Calculator
description: Industrial-grade risk assessment for inventory turnover performance, incorporating variability, obsolescence, and carrying cost exposure. Aligns with ISO 9001, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC DC Metrics.

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total average value of inventory over the period (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total average value of inventory over the period (e.g., monthly average of COGS-based inventory).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem boyunca envanterin toplam ortalama değeri (örneğin, SMM bazlı envanterin aylık ortalaması).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter durchschnittlicher Lagerwert über den Zeitraum (z. B. monatlicher Durchschnitt des auf COGS basierenden Lagerbestands).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale moyenne des stocks sur la période (par exemple, moyenne mensuelle des stocks basée sur le COGS).
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total promedio del inventario durante el período (ej.: promedio mensual del inventario basado en COGS).

inputs.label: Annual Cost of Goods Sold (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of goods sold over the last 12 months.

label_i18n.es: Costo anual de los bienes vendidos (USD)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of goods sold over the last 12 months.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son 12 aydaki satılan malın toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtkosten der verkauften Waren in den letzten 12 Monaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total des marchandises vendues au cours des 12 derniers mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de los bienes vendidos en los últimos 12 meses.

inputs.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher values indicate greater unpredictability.

label_i18n.fr: Coefficient de variabilité de la demande (CV)
label_i18n.es: Coeficiente de variabilidad de la demanda (CV)

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of variation of monthly demand (standard deviation / mean). Higher values indicate greater unpredictability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aylık talebin varyasyon katsayısı (standart sapma / ortalama). Daha yüksek değerler daha fazla öngörülemezliği gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variationskoeffizient der monatlichen Nachfrage (Standardabweichung / Mittelwert). Höhere Werte bedeuten größere Unvorhersagbarkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de variation de la demande mensuelle (écart type / moyenne). Des valeurs plus élevées indiquent une plus grande imprévisibilité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de variación de la demanda mensual (desviación estándar / media). Valores más altos indican mayor imprevisibilidad.

inputs.label: Obsolescence Rate (% per year)
inputs.businessContext: Annual percentage of inventory value that becomes obsolete or expired.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual percentage of inventory value that becomes obsolete or expired.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eskiyen veya son kullanma tarihi geçen envanter değerinin yıllık yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Prozentsatz des Lagerwerts, der veraltet oder abläuft.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage annuel de la valeur des stocks qui devient obsolète ou périmé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje anual del valor del inventario que se vuelve obsoleto o vence.

inputs.label: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate (% per year)
inputs.businessContext: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a percentage of inventory value.

label_i18n.en: Inventory Carrying Cost Rate (% per year)
label_i18n.fr: Taux de coût de possession des stocks (% par an)
label_i18n.es: Tasa de costo de mantenimiento de inventario (% anual)

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual cost to hold inventory (storage, insurance, capital, etc.) as a percentage of inventory value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Envanteri elde tutmanın yıllık maliyeti (depolama, sigorta, sermaye vb.) envanter değerinin yüzdesi olarak.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Kosten für die Lagerhaltung (Lagerung, Versicherung, Kapital usw.) als Prozentsatz des Lagerwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel de détention des stocks (stockage, assurance, capital, etc.) en pourcentage de la valeur des stocks.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual de mantener inventario (almacenamiento, seguros, capital, etc.) como porcentaje del valor del inventario.

inputs.label: Average Lead Time (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Average replenishment lead time from order placement to receipt.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average replenishment lead time from order placement to receipt.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sipariş vermeden teslim almaya kadar geçen ortalama tedarik süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Wiederbeschaffungszeit von Bestellung bis Eingang.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Délai moyen de réapprovisionnement entre la passation de commande et la réception.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo de entrega promedio de reabastecimiento desde la colocación del pedido hasta la recepción.

inputs.label: Service Level Target (%)
inputs.businessContext: Target fill rate or cycle service level (e.g., 95% = 0.95).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target fill rate or cycle service level (e.g., 95% = 0.95).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef doluluk oranı veya çevrim hizmet seviyesi (örneğin, %95 = 0,95).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de service cible ou niveau de service cycle (ex. 95% = 0.95).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de llenado objetivo o nivel de servicio del ciclo (ej., 95% = 0.95).

inputs.label: Inventory Record Accuracy (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of inventory records matching physical counts (cycle count accuracy).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of inventory records matching physical counts (cycle count accuracy).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fiziksel sayımlarla eşleşen envanter kayıtlarının yüzdesi (döngü sayım doğruluğu).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Bestandsaufzeichnungen, die mit physischen Zählungen übereinstimmen (Zykluszählgenauigkeit).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des enregistrements de stocks correspondant aux inventaires physiques (précision du comptage cyclique).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de registros de inventario que coinciden con los conteos físicos (precisión del conteo cíclico).

rules.message: Average inventory value must be greater than zero.
Annual COGS must be greater than zero.
Demand variability coefficient must be between 0 and 2.
Obsolescence rate must be between 0 and 100.
Carrying cost rate must be between 0 and 100.
Lead time must be greater than 0 days.
Service level target must be between 50% and 99.99%.
Inventory accuracy must be between 0% and 100%.
Industry benchmark turnover must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Turnover is within 80% of industry benchmark. Low risk.
Turnover is between 50% and 80% of benchmark. Moderate risk.
Turnover is below 50% of industry benchmark. High risk of excess inventory and obsolescence.
Carrying cost rate exceeds 30%. Consider reducing inventory levels.
Obsolescence rate exceeds 10%. Immediate review of slow-moving items required.
Inventory record accuracy below 95%. Risk of stockouts and excess safety stock.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
